modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Document displays symbols instead of text in Microsoft Word.

full_description_text: 
When opening a document in Microsoft Word, part of the content appears as symbols or codes. This issue disrupts the readability of the document. The problem occurs in the Office365 environment.
short_description: Document displays symbols instead of text in Microsoft Word.
description: When opening a document in Microsoft Word, part of the content appears as symbols or codes. This issue disrupts the readability of the document. The problem occurs in the Office365 environment.
